basics.name: Ambalavanan M
basics.label: Software Developer
basics.summary: Results-oriented Software Developer and AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner with a comprehensive foundation in Java, Python, C++, C, and Web Technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript). Technical expertise spans across robust solution development, bolstered by a strong command of Core Concepts (DSA, OOP, DBMS, SQL) and modern Tools & Platforms (Git, GitHub). Proven track record of engineering diverse, high-impact applications, including scalable AWS Cloud Architectures (S3, Lambda, API Gateway, CloudFront), Machine Learning (Linear Regression) models, and secure Blockchain (Solidity) systems. Driven by solving complex algorithmic challenges and creating innovative, effective software solutions.

projects.name: Crisis Response Management
projects.description: A comprehensive system to coordinate resources and communication efficiently during emergency crises.

projects.name: SKE Textiles
projects.description: An inventory and sales management platform tailored for textile manufacturing business operations.

projects.name: E-Voting Using Blockchain
projects.description: Secure and transparent voting application leveraging blockchain technology to prevent fraud and tampering.

projects.name: Online Quiz Management
projects.description: Interactive quiz platform for educational institutions featuring real-time scoring and performance reporting.

projects.name: Loan Approval Prediction
projects.description: The AI Loan Prediction Portal is a comprehensive, end-to-end Machine Learning web application designed to assess and predict loan approval statuses instantly. By leveraging historical financial data and modern cloud architecture, this project bridges the gap between raw datasets and a fully functional user-facing product.

projects.name: YouTube focusmode browser extension
projects.description: Eliminate distractions on YouTube. Hide comments, recommendations, and Shorts with a single click. Focus on what matters.

projects.name: Local Retrieval-Augmented Generation
projects.description: This application allows users to upload documents (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, TXT) to their local machine, automatically chunk and embed the text into a completely local vector database using HuggingFace models, and "chat" with their documents seamlessly.

projects.name: Qr code Generator
projects.description: Qr code generation for all Text, URL, wifi connection, mail sending
